weight.read: Two weeks of near-daily logging gives a real but early trend of −0.2 kg/week; the daily swings of up to 1.5 kg are normal noise, and the 7-day average of 82.4 kg is the only number worth tracking. At this pace you'd arrive at roughly 80.4 kg by July 30 — about 1.4 kg short of the 79 kg target. Closing that gap requires approximately 0.35 kg/week, which is within a healthy rate but means roughly doubling the current deficit.
actions: Log food intake for 5 of the next 7 days — rough estimates are fine — specifically to locate a 150–200 kcal/day reduction you can sustain; that is the precise gap between your current pace and the ~0.35 kg/week needed to reach 79 kg by July 30.
Anchor a 30g-protein breakfast each morning this week to reduce compensatory hunger later in the day as you tighten the deficit.
